Home > Image Generation > Jimeng AI

Jimeng AI

★★★★☆ 66 credits/day Paid from: Free (66 credits/day)

Visit official site →

ByteDance's AI image generation tool, part of the Douyin ecosystem. Free daily credits, high quality images.

Free Credits Details

  • Amount: 66 credits
  • Reset: Resets daily
  • Watermark: No
  • Commercial: Personal use

Key Features

  • Text to Image
  • Image to Image
  • Smart Outpainting
  • Inpainting
  • Multiple style templates

Pros

  • ByteDance quality
  • 66 daily credits enough
  • Rich style templates
  • Fast access in China

Cons

  • Credits vary by feature
  • Some premium styles require payment
  • Occasional queuing

Tips

  • Smart outpainting is very useful
  • Login with Douyin account
  • Start with templates for better results
